rows.label: qev041404_MSG0001
rows.name:
Right after the fireworks went BOOM, I
was blown all the way out here, mo. Do
you not think I am extremely pitiful, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0002
rows.name:
...If you think I am pitiful, then hurry
up and fetch the coldberries and spicy
sacrifole pollen, mo! I am starving, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0003
rows.name:
*Sniff* *Sniff*... I smell something
good, mo. This is the scent of coldberries
and spicy sacrifole pollen, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0004
rows.name:
You fetched them for me, mo?!
H-hurry up and hand them over, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0005
rows.name:
*Munch*... *Munch*! Delicious, mo!
*Munch*! This is the best, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0006
rows.name: Phew... I feel alive again, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0007
rows.name:
Yes, my stomach is completely full now,
so I will return to the caravan, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0008
rows.name:
You should return to
Ngogo, mo. Farewell, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041404_MSG0009
rows.name:
Pissa has not returned at all, mo.
Caravan work is piling up, yet she
is neglecting her duties, mo.[ST:wait ]
